task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into SuiteCRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SuiteCRM dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login using the provided admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the Accounts assigned to Alex Mercer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Accounts list view shows a search or filter applied for 'Assigned to: Alex Mercer', displaying the 5 target accounts.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent reassigned the Accounts to Jordan Hayes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Mass Update panel or individual edit screens showing the 'Assigned to' field being changed to 'Jordan Hayes' for the Accounts, or the final Accounts list view showing Jordan Hayes as the new assignee for the 5 records.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the Opportunities assigned to Alex Mercer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Opportunities list view shows a search or filter applied for 'Assigned to: Alex Mercer', displaying the 5 target opportunities.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent reassigned the Opportunities to Jordan Hayes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Mass Update panel or individual edit screens showing the 'Assigned to' field being changed to 'Jordan Hayes' for the Opportunities, or the final Opportunities list view showing Jordan Hayes as the new assignee for the 5 records.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to perform the reassignments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the SuiteCRM UI, not a terminal window executing SQL queries or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the list views and update forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show checkboxes being selected, filter panels open, or the Mass Update section expanded at the bottom of the list views.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the reassignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element/DevTools) are open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Departing Rep: Alex Mercer (exactly 5 Accounts and 5 Opportunities initially assigned). New Rep: Jordan Hayes. Control Rep: Taylor Reed (exactly 3 Accounts and 3 Opportunities, which must remain untouched). The agent must reassign exactly 5 Accounts and 5 Opportunities from Alex Mercer to Jordan Hayes.
